creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear Alex,

I'm really sorry to hear that this wonderful project is not going ahead at the moment. I have been following the related thread closely, but I don't believe that anyone here is deliberately delaying or obstructing the necessary improvements to linuxulator. It's more likely that nobody currently has the capacity or sufficient knowledge to do so?

Unfortunately, I have no skills at all to help here, but I very much hope that others with more knowledge will soon be able to move the linuxulator forward.

Is there any chance of adapting the steam-utils for 64bit in the longer term or will it have to stay at 32bit?


Well, anyway, I took you out of the port as maintainer as requested, too bad. Thank you very much for the many years of good work on a difficult project.
